declared_unit: A single 150 kVA Vegetable Oil Filled Transformer (including packaging) operating throughout its entire service life, which is 35 years.
modules_reported: A1, A2, A3, A4, A5, B6, C1, C2, C3, C4 (D not declared)
note: Results tables report A1, A2, A3 in separate columns with no aggregated A1-A3 column, so the three modules were summed. GWP-GHG: 2.85E3+1.93E1+1.28E2=2997.3; GWP-fossil: 3.27E3+1.94E1+1.30E2=3419.4; GWP-biogenic: -3.26E2+6.13E-3+1.81=-324.18; GWP-total: 3.16E3+1.94E1+1.32E2=3311.4.
